Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $82,051,601Details
International Box Office $163,276,773
Worldwide Box Office $245,328,374
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,248,705
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $16,523,427
Total $24,772,132
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After supervillain Shredder escapes custody, he joins forces with mad scientist Baxter Stockman and two dimwitted henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, to unleash a diabolical plan to take over the world. As the Turtles prepare to take on Shredder and his new crew, they find themselves facing an even greater evil with similar intentions: the notorious Krang.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$35,316,382 (43.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$135,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,071 opening theaters/4,071 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $113,449,379

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 3rd, 2016 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: June 2nd, 2016 (Wide) (Mexico)
June 2nd, 2016 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
June 2nd, 2016 (Wide) (Portugal)
June 2nd, 2016 (Wide) (Slovakia)
June 2nd, 2016 (Wide) (Bulgaria)
Video Release: September 6th, 2016 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sci-fi action violence.
(Rating bulletin 2424 (Cert #50419), 5/11/2016)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Franchise: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
Cast, crew, or production detail: Live Action Remake, Motion Capture Performance
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR

Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action

Languages: English

Synopsis

After supervillain Shredder escapes custody, he joins forces with mad scientist Baxter Stockman and two dimwitted henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, to unleash a diabolical plan to take over the world. As the Turtles prepare to take on Shredder and his new crew, they find themselves facing an even greater evil with similar intentions: the notorious Krang.

Opening Weekend:$35,316,382 (43.0% of total gross)

Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $113,449,379
